commands: set --; sample_nb=''; for nb in submissions/*Advanced_Day2*.ipynb; do [ "$nb" = 'submissions/*Advanced_Day2*.ipynb' ] && continue; if [ "$nb" = 'submissions/Advanced_Day2_homework_test_filled.ipynb' ]; then sample_nb="$nb"; continue; fi; set -- "$@" "$nb"; done; if [ "$#" -eq 0 ] && [ -n "$sample_nb" ]; then set -- "$sample_nb"; fi; if [ "$#" -eq 0 ]; then echo 'ERROR: No matching Day 2 notebook found; add exactly one non-sample submission or keep the bundled sample notebook for fallback grading'; exit 1; fi; if [ "$#" -ne 1 ]; then echo 'ERROR: Multiple matching Day 2 notebooks found'; exit 1; fi; jupyter nbconvert --to script "$1" --output day2 --output-dir .
if [ ! -f day2.py ]; then echo 'ERROR: Notebook conversion failed - day2.py not found'; exit 1; fi
